identity.name: Inversiones Svan ERP
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Priority (High Contrast for Retail Environments)

primary.description: Teal-700: Professional, grounded, distinct from generic SaaS blue.

secondary.description: Emerald-500: Freshness, Growth, 'Add to Cart' actions.

accent.description: Amber-500: Low stock warnings, attention needed.

destructive.description: Red-500: Delete, Cancel, Out of Stock.

grid_system.pos_products: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4

desktop.pos_layout: Split Screen: Left 70% Products, Right 30% Sticky Cart

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg
buttons.pos_action: h-14 text-lg font-semibold w-full rounded-xl shadow-md

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm
cards.product: flex flex-col p-3 gap-2 cursor-pointer active:scale-95 transition-transform bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

layout_rules: MOBILE FIRST: Always design the mobile view first. The POS screen must be usable with one hand on a phone.
TOUCH TARGETS: All interactive elements on the POS screen must be at least 44px height.
NAVIGATION: Use a Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile (Dashboard, POS, Inventory, Menu). Use a Sidebar for Desktop.
POS SCREEN: On Desktop, split screen (Products Left, Cart Right). On Mobile, Cart is a floating button that opens a Drawer.
component_overrides: Override Shadcn 'Button' to be slightly more rounded (rounded-lg).
Override Shadcn 'Card' to have lighter borders and softer shadows.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it clean and flat.
Ensure high contrast for text (Slate-900 on Slate-50).
Animations should be fast (150ms-200ms). No slow drifts.
